name: USB-C Wall Charger with 10ft USB-C to USB-C Cable Home Charging Kit - dealworthy™ White
description:
Power up your devices safely and efficiently with the USB-C Wall Charger with 10ft USB-C to USB-C Cable Home Charging Kit from dealworthy™ in White. This lightweight kit includes a wall adapter and a 10-foot USB-C to USB-C cable, giving you flexibility and reach for convenient charging anywhere at home or on the go. Designed for reliable performance, it offers 20W of fast charging power and features short circuit and surge protection for peace of mind. With quick charge technology and a durable USB-C connection, this set keeps your devices powered up quickly and safely every time.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.™
100% Satisfaction Guaranteed or your Money Back.
